svg.aria-label: Cell color: accuracy ≥2 pass rate per category × model. Red <50%, amber 50-75%, green >75%.
svg.title: Per-Category Accuracy by Model
svg.desc: Cell color: accuracy ≥2 pass rate per category × model. Red <50%, amber 50-75%, green >75%.
svg.text: Cell value: fraction of queries in the category scoring accuracy ≥2 (calibrated rubric). Lower is corpus-limited, not model-limited.
